data.title: FIFA partners with Aleph for World Cup 2026 in Philippines, focusing on distribution and commercialization.
data.description: Today, Aleph, a worldwide digital advertising firm specializing in media and cross-border payments, announced its appointment by FIFA as the sole partner for managing commercialization and multimedia distribution. The agreement was finalized on Feb. 12, 2026.

data.title: DXC Technology (NYSE: DXC) to present at the Morgan Stanley Conference on March 2, 2026 in San Francisco.
data.description: A technology company, DXC Technology (NYSE: DXC), renowned globally and listed on the Fortune 500, revealed plans to take part in the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference on March 2, 2026, in San Francisco. The event will feature a presentation by Raul Fernandez from DXC. Located in Ashburn, Va., DXC specializes in technology services and operates on a worldwide scale. This participation at the upcoming conference signifies a significant industry engagement for the company.

data.title: Colorado renters can now earn cash back and build credit with Stake's Renter Network, joining 550,000 renters nationwide.
data.description: In Colorado, renters are now able to accumulate equity through immediate cash benefits, as well as establish credit and savings for the future. This initiative aims to create a more equitable environment for renters compared to homeowners. Spearheaded by Stake, The Renter Network, over 550,000 renters across the country are already benefiting from this program. The project was launched in Dallas on February 12, 2026.

data.title: Elf Labs hires Kiplin "777MIDAS" Evans to compose music for "RoboStars" series. Grammy-winning producer joins creative team.
data.description: A renowned music producer, Kiplin "777MIDAS" Evans, known for his Grammy Award-winning work, has recently joined a highly experienced creative team at Elf Labs in Miami. This collaboration comes as the studio expands its efforts to develop a large-scale animated universe. Evans will be responsible for composing and producing the original score for upcoming projects. The news was made public on February 12, 2026.

data.title: Ocean Tomo releases study on Intangible Asset Market Value with 50-year US data. Global consulting firm J.S. Held announces findings.
data.description: J.S. Held, a renowned global consulting firm, has recently unveiled the Ocean Tomo Intangible Asset Market Value (IAMV) study in New York on February 12, 2026. The study draws on a comprehensive 50-year analysis of the US market along with 20 years of foreign market data to inform the components of market value. This release sheds light on key insights gathered from extensive research, providing valuable information for assessing intangible asset market value.

data.title: FedEx holds 2026 Investor Day, focusing on growth in high-margin areas, digital capabilities, and profit improvement.
data.description: FedEx Corp revealed their strategy at the 2026 Investor Day to solidify their position as the top industrial network driving the global economy. They plan to focus on premium growth in high-margin verticals, enhance their digital and AI capabilities, and continue to evolve their network for increased profit and shareholder value. With over fifty years of experience, FedEx (NYSE: FDX) aims to capitalize on these initiatives for long-term success.

data.title: TASKING celebrates 1 year of LDRA acquisition by launching end-to-end "Compile, Debug, Test" toolchain for critical systems.
data.description: In Munich, TASKING, a prominent player in high-performance embedded software development tools, marked the one-year anniversary of acquiring LDRA by releasing its new TASKING toolchain. This integrated toolchain combines LDRA and TASKING capabilities, offering comprehensive end-to-end compile, debug, and test functions. Equipped with AI enhancements, it aims to expedite the development of safe and secure embedded real-time systems in the automotive sector. The toolchain promises streamlined operations for designing functionally secure systems and is poised to make a significant impact in the industry.

data.title: NPK International (NYSE: NPKI) to release Q4 and full-year 2025 results on Feb 25, 2026. Conference call on Feb 26 at 9:30AM ET.
data.description: NPK International Inc. (NYSE: NPKI) based in The Woodlands, Texas, is set to release its fourth quarter and full-year 2025 financial results on February 25, 2026, after the U.S. markets close. Following this, a conference call will take place on February 26, 2026, at 9:30 a.m. ET to discuss the results and engage in a Q&A session. Investors and the public can tune in to a webcast of the call and access presentation materials.
UKRAINE SPORTS MINISTER TO REUTERS: DECISION TO DISQUALIFY SKELETON RACER MORE HARMFUL FOR IOC THAN HERASKEVYCH

data.title: AdvoCare introduces Collagen + Creatine for muscle strength, cognitive performance, and skin vitality, each serving includes 7.5g collagen peptides and 3g creatine.
data.description: In Richardson, Texas, AdvoCare International, LLC, a prominent health and wellness company, has unveiled Collagen + Creatine, a new product aimed at aiding active individuals in enhancing strength, mental acuity, and skin health. This scientifically supported solution contains 7.5 grams of collagen peptides and 3 grams of creatine monohydrate per serving. The supplement is formulated to boost muscle strength, cognitive function, joint support, and skin vitality. The product is unflavored and offers comprehensive benefits for those looking to perform better every day.

data.title: BGC Group (Nasdaq: BGC) reports Q4 and full year 2025 financial results. Full details available at http://ir.bgcg.com/.
data.description: BGC Group, Inc. released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending December 31, 2025. The report can be found online including details on a recent dividend declaration and a conference call. BGC Group, Inc. is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol BGC, operating as a major player in the global marketplace and data sector. Additional financial information, earnings presentation, and supplemental tables are also available on their investor relations website.

data.title: Survey by Squaremouth shows 53% interest in luxury cruises this wave season. Experts debate if cruise insurance is worth it.
data.description: In St. Petersburg, Florida, on February 12, 2026, the cruise industry is experiencing high demand during this wave season. A survey by Squaremouth, a top travel insurance comparison site, reveals that 53% of travelers are particularly drawn to luxury or premium cruises. The interest in these types of cruises is significantly high this year.

data.title: Composer debuts first modern kitchen garbage disposal at KBIS 2026, named Best of KBIS Finalist. Feb. 12, 2026.
data.description: Composer One has been selected as a finalist for the Best of KBIS award for innovation in the kitchen industry. The product, which was launched in Oakland, Calif. on Feb. 12, 2026, aims to revolutionize the traditional kitchen garbage disposal. Historically known for being noisy, easily obstructed, and not aligned with the needs of contemporary kitchens, Composer One offers a groundbreaking solution. This innovation addresses long-standing issues by providing a quieter, more efficient, and technologically integrated option. Its revolutionary features have sparked interest, leading to its nomination for the prestigious award.

data.title: PodcastOne (PODC) Q3 earnings exceed expectations, EPS at $-0.01 vs $-0.02 estimate, revenue up $3.15M YoY. Investors take note.
data.description: PodcastOne (NASDAQ: PODC) unveiled its Q3 earnings report on February 12, 2026, at 08:00 AM. The report exceeded expectations as the company reported an EPS of $-0.01, surpassing the estimated $-0.02 by 50.0%. Revenue saw a significant increase, rising by $3.15 million compared to the previous year. This strong performance indicates promising growth for PodcastOne. For more detailed insights, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Truist launches open banking platform for consumers & small businesses, offering more control & access to fintech tools.
data.description: Truist Financial Corporation, based in Charlotte, North Carolina, announced on February 12, 2026, the launch of a new platform aimed at providing consumer and small business clients with increased control over their financial data. As part of this initiative, the company introduced its inaugural open banking integration. Truist Financial Corporation, listed on the New York Stock Exchange as TFC, aims to enhance user experience by facilitating seamless access to trusted fintech tools through this innovative platform.

data.title: BioLife Solutions partners with Qkine Limited for cytokines market expansion, multi-year deal. #BLFS #Qkine
data.description: Bothell, Washington - On February 12, 2026, BioLife Solutions, Inc. (NASDAQ: BLFS) revealed a significant development in a press release. The company, renowned for its bioproduction tools and services catering to the cell and gene therapy (CGT) industry, disclosed the initiation of a multi-year supply deal with Qkine Limited. This agreement marks a pivotal step in BioLife Solutions' strategy, enhancing its position in the market. The contract is set to cover a significant volume of supplies over the coming years, showcasing the company's commitment to growth and innovation in the CGT sector.
